src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/enkarin/bookcros.why_exists: Java 21 enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be effectively final and private static final long, but the annotation is required for explicit declaration to avoid warnings/errors in strict modes or future versions).
